description: Abyssal Depths Patch 2 (23 July 2025) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

subsections.heading: Antiquarian’s Den Changes

items.text: Antiquarian’s Dens now contain a Marketplace vendor for the corresponding city’s Marketplace
The Antiquarian now shows its pet’s name, as chosen by the community

subsections.searchable_text: Antiquarian’s Den Changes Antiquarian’s Dens now contain a Marketplace vendor for the corresponding city’s Marketplace The Antiquarian now shows its pet’s name, as chosen by the community

subsections.heading: The Depths Changes

items.text: Opening a small chest after completing a room now grants a Demonic Ferocity stack to all party members in range
In the final level of the Depths, an additional key will appear after ten minutes, and every 3 minutes after that, if the Treasure Vault has not yet been opened
Minimap icons for Coffers and Chests have been made larger
Treasure Coffers now only appear on the minimap when in proximity
There are now PvE and PvP Fame categories for the Depths category in the Player, Guild, and Alliance Rankings
Timer in the entrance UI now displays seconds when less than 1 minute remains

subsections.searchable_text: The Depths Changes Opening a small chest after completing a room now grants a Demonic Ferocity stack to all party members in range In the final level of the Depths, an additional key will appear after ten minutes, and every 3 minutes after that, if the Treasure Vault has not yet been opened Minimap icons for Coffers and Chests have been made larger Treasure Coffers now only appear on the minimap when in proximity There are now PvE and PvP Fame categories for the Depths category in the Player, Guild, and Alliance Rankings Timer in the entrance UI now displays seconds when less than 1 minute remains

subsections.heading: Albion Journal Changes

items.text: The following missions have had their rewards adjusted

subitems.text: Get a Weapon Generalist Node to level 30
Get a Weapon Specialist Node to level 30
Reach Level 30 in any Weapon Generalist Node
Reach Level 30 in any Weapon Specialist Node
Apply a Chest, Shoe and Helmet skin
Unlock x Wardrobe or Mount Skins

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Changes The following missions have had their rewards adjusted Get a Weapon Generalist Node to level 30 Get a Weapon Specialist Node to level 30 Unlock Tier 5 Reaver Unlock Tier 7 Reaver Reach Level 30 in any Weapon Generalist Node Reach Level 30 in any Weapon Specialist Node Apply a Chest, Shoe and Helmet skin Unlock x Wardrobe or Mount Skins

subsections.heading: UI Changes

items.text: Updated icons for Generalist and Specialist nodes in the Quick Learn node management UI
To minimize notification spam, players will now receive fewer notifications when multiple Destiny Board nodes are leveled up simultaneously
10v10 Hellgate stats have been archived in the player stats UI
Kill Details UI now displays a full timestamp for each kill
Appearance UI filters now persist after switching tabs or closing the UI

subsections.searchable_text: UI Changes Updated icons for Generalist and Specialist nodes in the Quick Learn node management UI To minimize notification spam, players will now receive fewer notifications when multiple Destiny Board nodes are leveled up simultaneously 10v10 Hellgate stats have been archived in the player stats UI Kill Details UI now displays a full timestamp for each kill Appearance UI filters now persist after switching tabs or closing the UI

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Mobs and mob groups in the open world and the Depths now have shorter leash ranges when not attacked

subitems.text: This change has been made to make open-world travel more comfortable and to help players in the Depths stay focused during ongoing PvP encounters

items.text: Book Chests and Hidden Treasures have been removed from Corrupted Dungeons

subitems.text: Treasure spawns that were previously either Book Chests or Treasure Chests will now always spawn Treasure Chests

items.text: Fame shrines have been removed from Hellgates
All Captured Smugglers’ guards are now Tier 6
Duels are no longer possible within Hellgates
Gathering tools can no longer be swapped while in combat
[CONTROLLER] Implemented basic HUD Tracker support

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Albion Journal Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the mission ‘Apply a Chest, Shoe and Helmet Skin’ stated that all needed to be applied simultaneously
Fixed issue where ‘Participate in x Raids’ missions would not track progress correctly
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Hunt a Rare Creature’ would not count higher-tier Tracking targets
Fixed issue where the mission ‘Catch 5 fish’ could progress from unrelated items
Fixed issue where the missions ‘Defeat any Crystal Cobra’ and ‘Defeat any Crystal Beetle’ displayed the wrong icons
Progress bars for combat specialization leveling missions now display the number of achieved nodes

subsections.searchable_text: Albion Journal Fixes Fixed issue where the mission ‘Apply a Chest, Shoe and Helmet Skin’ stated that all needed to be applied simultaneously Fixed issue where ‘Participate in x Raids’ missions would not track progress correctly Fixed issue where the mission ‘Hunt a Rare Creature’ would not count higher-tier Tracking targets Fixed issue where the mission ‘Catch 5 fish’ could progress from unrelated items Fixed issue where the missions ‘Defeat any Crystal Cobra’ and ‘Defeat any Crystal Beetle’ displayed the wrong icons Progress bars for combat specialization leveling missions now display the number of achieved nodes

subsections.heading: Mob Fixes

items.text: In the Living Legacy event, the mob Eastern Titan of the Nineteenth Age’s Separator spell now knocks players into the air
Fixed issue where Royal Guard Towers outside Royal Cities would not attack players from enemy factions
Fixed issue where Sir Bedivere would not perform auto-attacks when affected by Smokebomb
Fixed issue where Shadow Panther would not spawn additional panthers within its Silencing Mist

subsections.searchable_text: Mob Fixes In the Living Legacy event, the mob Eastern Titan of the Nineteenth Age’s Separator spell now knocks players into the air Fixed issue where Royal Guard Towers outside Royal Cities would not attack players from enemy factions Fixed issue where Sir Bedivere would not perform auto-attacks when affected by Smokebomb Fixed issue where Shadow Panther would not spawn additional panthers within its Silencing Mist

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where available Learning Points in the Destiny Board were rounded in a misleading way
Fixed issue where Caerleon’s Antiquarian’s Den entrance displayed the wrong minimap icon
Fixed issue where default item sorting would not follow Marketplace categorization
Fixed issue where ‘Home’ button would erroneously display as a respawn option
Fixed issue where clicking a chat link would move the character if ‘Lock Window’ was enabled
Fixed issue where Death Recap would display a spell’s full CC duration, even if death occurred before this duration was elapsed
Fixed various HUD Tracker display issues
Fixed issue where the toggle to hide/show Vanity Sources was missing its icon
Quick Thinker (Leather Jackets, Hoods, and Shoes): Fixed issue where an incorrect Cooldown Rate was displayed in the item details
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where hovering over a node on the Destiny Board would sometimes cause it to open and close repeatedly

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where available Learning Points in the Destiny Board were rounded in a misleading way Fixed issue where Caerleon’s Antiquarian’s Den entrance displayed the wrong minimap icon Fixed issue where default item sorting would not follow Marketplace categorization Fixed issue where ‘Home’ button would erroneously display as a respawn option Fixed issue where clicking a chat link would move the character if ‘Lock Window’ was enabled Fixed issue where Death Recap would display a spell’s full CC duration, even if death occurred before this duration was elapsed Fixed various HUD Tracker display issues Fixed issue where the toggle to hide/show Vanity Sources was missing its icon Quick Thinker (Leather Jackets, Hoods, and Shoes): Fixed issue where an incorrect Cooldown Rate was displayed in the item details [CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where hovering over a node on the Destiny Board would sometimes cause it to open and close repeatedly

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the carry weight bonus from shoe passives would be reduced by Item Power caps
Fixed issue where players could enter the next Hellgate without defeating the enemy team, and would not receive a reward chest after doing so
Fixed issue where the rarity VFX of Treasure Vaults in the Depths would not display once opened
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where Group Dungeon entrances in the Mists could sometimes not be used
Various fixes and improvements to tutorial missions
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
